name: cloud-readiness
description: This ruleset detects logging configurations that may be problematic when migrating an application to a cloud environment.

incidents.message: The app is trying to access local resource by JDBC, please try to migrate the resource to cloud
incidents.codeSnip:
155                  <datasource jndi-name="java:jboss/datasources/ExampleDS" pool-name="ExampleDS" enabled="true" use-java-context="true" statistics-enabled="${wildfly.datasources.statistics-enabled:${wildfly.statistics-enabled:false}}">
156                      <connection-url>jdbc:h2:mem:test;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE</connection-url>
157                      <driver>h2</driver>
158                      <security>
159                          <user-name>sa</user-name>
160                          <password>sa</password>
161                      </security>
162                  </datasource>
163                  <datasource jndi-name="java:jboss/datasources/CoolstoreDS" pool-name="postgresDS">
164                      <connection-url>jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/postgres</connection-url>
165                      <driver>postgres</driver>
166                      <security>
167                          <user-name>postgres</user-name>
168                          <password>postgres</password>
169                      </security>
170                  </datasource>
171                  <drivers>
172                      <driver name="h2" module="com.h2database.h2">
173                          <xa-datasource-class>org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource</xa-datasource-class>
174                      </driver>
175                      <driver name="postgres" module="org.postgres"/>
